translated_zh: 睇下佢點樣處理嗰場。

whisper_en: This is race 562, gate seven here in orange and white colours.
verified_en: This is Race 562, gate seven here in orange and white colours.
translated_zh: 呢場係第五六二場，嗰匹橙白衫嘅馬喺七檔。

whisper_en: Bulb General jumps well for Zach Burton,
verified_en: Bulb General jumps well for Zac Purton.
translated_zh: 布爾將軍為柏寶起跳出色。

whisper_en: but this race is a contrast with the one that we just saw,
verified_en: but this race is a contrast with the one that we just saw
translated_zh: 但呢場賽同我哋啱先睇嗰場好唔同

whisper_en: as the early speed here is pretty good.
verified_en: as the early speed here is pretty good.
translated_zh: 呢度早段速度幾快。

whisper_en: Zach lets Bulb General find his feet as is usual and he ends up towards the rear with
verified_en: Zak let Bulb General find his feet as is usual, and he ends up towards the rear with
translated_zh: 扎克讓「燈泡通」照慣例找狀態，最後落後到排尾同埋

whisper_en: another of Saturday's rivals Patch of Stars in yellow, white and blue a few lengths ahead
verified_en: another of Saturday's rivals Patch of Stars in yellow, white and blue a few lengths ahead
translated_zh: 星期六另一對手「星彩」黃白藍衣領先數碼位

whisper_en: of him on the rail.
verified_en: of him on the rail.
translated_zh: 佢喺欄邊跑。

whisper_en: Now the pace increases again mid-race so it's really run to suit horses off the pace and
verified_en: Now the pace increases again mid-race so it's really run to suit horses off the pace.
translated_zh: 而家中段步速再加快，真係跑給慢腳馬啱。

whisper_en: when they straighten up Patch of Stars comes to pounce, he comes up short behind Young
verified_en: When they straighten up, Patch of Stars comes to pounce; he comes up short behind Young.
translated_zh: 直路時星彩展開追擊；但最終落後於揚。

whisper_en: Champion with Bulb General working home steadily into third.
verified_en: Champion with Bob General working home steadily into third.
translated_zh: 同班冠軍鮑伯將軍穩步走返第三。

whisper_en: Now Bob General will meet the first two that beat him home there on Saturday, but they
verified_en: Now Bob General will meet the first two that beat him home there on Saturday, but they
translated_zh: 而家寶通將同上週六喺佢之前過線嘅兩匹馬再碰頭，但佢哋……

whisper_en: were hard race fit horses and he was coming off quite a lengthy break.
verified_en: were hard race-fit horses and he was coming off quite a lengthy break.
translated_zh: 呢匹馬係硬仗後復出，而且喺長休之後。

whisper_en: So I do think he's going to tighten up and be a better version of himself on Saturday.
verified_en: So I do think he's going to tighten up and be a better version of himself on Saturday.
translated_zh: 我諗佢星期六會收緊馬勢，跑出一個更好嘅自己。

whisper_en: But I think when we go to the draw, that's where things are really getting interesting
verified_en: But I think when we go to the draw, that's where things are really getting interesting.
translated_zh: 不過我諗等抽到閘檔先至係真正精彩嘅時候。

whisper_en: in this race.
verified_en: in this race.
translated_zh: 呢場賽事。

whisper_en: There's good speed out wide here from Victor the winner, Crimson Flash and Ladies Choice.
verified_en: There's good speed out wide here from Victor the winner, Crimson Flash and Lady's Choice.
translated_zh: 外檔有速度嘅係勝出者維克多、紅閃同女仔揀。

whisper_en: So the tempo looks sound enough.
verified_en: So the tempo looks sound enough.
translated_zh: 節奏睇落都夠穩陣。

whisper_en: Bob General is drawn lower this time, while he's still not going to be on the front end
verified_en: Bob General is drawn lower this time, while he's still not going to be on the front end.
translated_zh: 鮑勃將軍今次排位較後，但仲係唔會喺最前頭。

whisper_en: of the race.
verified_en: of the race.
translated_zh: 呢場賽事嘅。

whisper_en: His jockey this time, Joe Marrera, should be able to use that draw to get a nice trip
verified_en: His jockey this time, Joe Moreira, should be able to use that draw to get a nice trip.
translated_zh: 今仗騎師莫雷拉應能利用呢個閘檔取得理想走位。

whisper_en: through the race.
verified_en: through the race.
translated_zh: 沿途表現。

whisper_en: Harry Bentley takes over on Hot Delight with the light weight, but his map looks filled
verified_en: Harry Bentley takes over on Hot Delight with the light weight, but his map looks filled.
translated_zh: 哈利·本特利策騎熱力，雖負輕磅但走位圖滿佈。

whisper_en: with a lot of decisions to make, and tough ones they are.
verified_en: with a lot of decisions to make, and tough ones they are.
translated_zh: 好多決定要揀，而且都好難揀。

whisper_en: We saw Hot Delight up on the speed, his last two starts in slow tempos, but with a better
verified_en: We saw Hot Delight up on the speed, his last two starts in slow tempos, but with a better
translated_zh: 我哋見熱心快喺領放位，佢上兩仗慢步速，但今次情況好啲。

whisper_en: pace and a wide draw here he would have trouble getting to a similar spot without covering ground
verified_en: pace and a wide draw here he would have trouble getting to a similar spot without covering ground
translated_zh: 呢個跑法加外閘，唔行多啲路好難去到同樣位置

whisper_en: and working and might even have to drag all the way back in the field so that he doesn't have a
verified_en: and working and might even have to drag all the way back in the field so that he doesn't have a
translated_zh: 而家要跑同埋甚至可能要拖返成個馬群後面先至唔會...

whisper_en: difficult run so the tip from me in race 11 bulb general his winning factor the draw now had they
verified_en: difficult run, so the tip from me in race 11 is Bulb General. His winning factor, the draw now had they
translated_zh: 呢場好艱難，所以我推介第十一場嘅「一般燈泡」。佢嘅勝出因素係而家嘅排位。

whisper_en: drawn the other way around i'm sure that i would have been tipping hot delight but his job looks
verified_en: Drawn the other way around, I'm sure that I would have been tipping Hot Delight, but his job looks
translated_zh: 若排位相反，我肯定會揀熱力，但佢嘅任務好似

whisper_en: full of difficulties. He's good enough to overcome them. I certainly don't want to
verified_en: full of difficulties. He's good enough to overcome them. I certainly don't want to
translated_zh: 充滿困難。佢實力足夠克服。我絕對唔想

whisper_en: say it's lights out for his chances but it brings him back to the older horse
verified_en: say it's lights out for his chances but it brings him back to the older horse
translated_zh: 話佢機會唔大，不過返到嚟同老馬對決。

whisper_en: who has drawn better this time, Bulb General, and should be fitter than he was
verified_en: who has drawn better this time, Bold General, and should be fitter than he was
translated_zh: 邊匹馬今次抽得較好？「大將」應該比上仗更壯。

whisper_en: for that first up run. Well that's it from the Winning Factor this week. Good
verified_en: for that first up run. Well, that's it from The Winning Factor this week. Good
translated_zh: 呢場係首次出賽。好喇，本週《勝算》就到呢度啦。多謝。

whisper_en: luck on Saturday. We'll see you next time.
verified_en: luck on Saturday. We'll see you next time.
translated_zh: 星期六祝你好運，下次再見。
